ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Figure out the sol-fa syllables for your hymn, folk, and modern language songs.
[ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Compose your own sol-fa melodies and sing them. Use dynamics as well as the various rhythms and scale tones you've learned.
[ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Spend extra time exploring the resources below to hone sight-reading skills, learn songs, and explore harmony and rhythm.
